text.content: Q1: Experience leading global GTM (100+ people)

I've led and scaled revenue operations for 10+ years, most recently driving 3x revenue growth at Penbrothers (B2B SaaS in Philippines). I built and managed a global sales and GTM team across multiple regions. I've also mentored 250+ startups through 500 Startups, Plug and Play, and other accelerators — helping them structure sales teams, implement CRM hygiene, and build repeatable revenue engines. Comfortable leading distributed teams across time zones.

Extensive experience with HubSpot — implementing from ground up at Penbrothers, building automated outbound sequences, managing CRM hygiene at scale, integrating with sales intelligence tools. Created custom workflows for lead scoring, automated follow-ups, and pipeline management.
Q3: Forecasting and revenue analytics approach

Data-first approach: build dashboards, track KPIs, translate insights into action. At Penbrothers, built forecasting model that drove 3x revenue growth. Use advanced Excel for modelling + BI tools for real-time visibility. Philosophy: if you can't measure it, you can't improve it.

Eftsure is at a critical inflection point — scaling from regional to global, fighting real cybercrime, with a mission that matters. I want to help build the revenue engine that gets them to IPO-level growth. Based in Tokyo (AU timezone manageable), excited to own RevOps end-to-end.
Open to discussion. Market rate for this level ($180-250K AUD) depending on equity and benefits.
Portuguese citizen, no visa required. Based in Tokyo, Japan. Happy to work hybrid from Sydney office as needed.
